import io
import string

fn find_eq(_ s: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n
    if found < 0
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          found = i
        end
      when None
        i = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found < 0
    None
  else
    Some(found)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      match find_eq(line)
      when Some(idx)
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
        let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, string.len(line))
        if string.len(key) > 0
          println("#{key}:#{value}")
        end
      when None
        done = done
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
end
